title: Quick Triggers
actors: Fred Humes, Derelys Perdue, Wilbur Mack
plot: Jake Landis (James Robert Chandler), the father of Jeanne Landis (Derelys Perdue), is being forced to help a gang of cattle rustlers led by Jeff Moore (Wilbur Mack.) Larry Day (Fred Humes) and his cowhands capture Landis but do no...
